testcase.name: getRoutsNotSellTest

Hibernate: drop table if exists TourGuideUser Hibernate: drop table if exists User Hibernate: create table DriverUser ( id bigint not null, expedient varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table ItemService ( quantity integer not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, purchase_id bigint, service_id bigint, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Purchase ( totalPrice float(23) not null, date datetime(6), id bigint not null auto_increment, route_id bigint, user_id bigint, code varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Review ( rating integer not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, purchase_id bigint not null, comment varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Route ( maxNumberUsers integer not null, price float(23) not null, totalKm float(23) not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table route_driver ( driver_id bigint not null, route_id bigint not null ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Route_Stop ( Route_id bigint not null, stops_id bigint not null ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table route_tour_guide ( route_id bigint not null, tour_guide_id bigint not null ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Service ( price float(23) not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, supplier_id bigint, name varchar(100) not null, description varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Stop ( id bigint not null auto_increment, description varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Supplier ( id bigint not null auto_increment, authorizationNumber varchar(255), businessName varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table TourGuideUser ( id bigint not null, education varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table User ( active bit not null, birthdate datetime(6), id bigint not null auto_increment, email varchar(255), name varchar(255), password varchar(255), phoneNumber varchar(255), username varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: alter table Review add constraint UK_k1hayctsk7sh28pkewme2cpwh unique (purchase_id) Hibernate: alter table Route add constraint testcase.name: getAllPurchasesOfUsernameTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select p1_0.id, p1_0.code, p1_0.date, p1_0.route_id, p1_0.totalPrice, p1_0.user_id from Purchase p1_0 join User u1_0 on u1_0.id=p1_0.user_id where u1_0.username=? Hibernate: select r1_0.id, r1_0.comment, r1_0.purchase_id, p1_0.id, p1_0.code, p1_0.date, r2_0.id, r2_0.maxNumberUsers, r2_0.name, r2_0.price, r2_0.totalKm, p1_0.totalPrice, u1_0.id, case when u1_1.id is not null then 1 when u1_2.id is not null then 2 when u1_0.id is not null then 0 end, u1_0.active, u1_0.birthdate, u1_0.email, u1_0.name, u1_0.password, u1_0.phoneNumber, u1_0.username, u1_1.expedient, u1_2.education, u1_1.id, u1_2.id, r1_0.rating from Review r1_0 join Purchase p1_0 on p1_0.id=r1_0.purchase_id left join Route r2_0 on r2_0.id=p1_0.route_id left join (User u1_0 left join DriverUser u1_1 on u1_0.id=u1_1.id left join TourGuideUser u1_2 on u1_0.id=u1_2.id) on u1_0.id=p1_0.user_id where r1_0.purchase_id=? Hibernate: select r1_0.id, r1_0.comment, r1_0.purchase_id, p1_0.id, p1_0.code, p1_0.date, r2_0.id, r2_0.maxNumberUsers, r2_0.name, r2_0.price, r2_0.totalKm, p1_0.totalPrice, u1_0.id, case when u1_1.id is not null then 1 when u1_2.id is not null then 2 when u1_0.id is not null then 0 end, u1_0.active, u1_0.birthdate, u1_0.email, u1_0.name, u1_0.password, u1_0.phoneNumber, u1_0.username, u1_1.expedient, u1_2.education, u1_1.id, u1_2.id, r1_0.rating from Review r1_0 join Purchase p1_0 on p1_0.id=r1_0.purchase_id left join Route r2_0 on r2_0.id=p1_0.route_id left join (User u1_0 left join DriverUser u1_1 on u1_0.id=u1_1.id left join TourGuideUser u1_2 on u1_0.id=u1_2.id) on u1_0.id=p1_0.user_id where r1_0.purchase_id=? Hibernate: select r1_0.id, r1_0.comment, r1_0.purchase_id, p1_0.id, p1_0.code, p1_0.date, r2_0.id, r2_0.maxNumberUsers, r2_0.name, r2_0.price, r2_0.totalKm, p1_0.totalPrice, u1_0.id, case when u1_1.id is not null then 1 when u1_2.id is not null then 2 when u1_0.id is not null then 0 end, u1_0.active, u1_0.birthdate, u1_0.email, u1_0.name, u1_0.password, u1_0.phoneNumber, u1_0.username, u1_1.expedient, u1_2.education, u1_1.id, u1_2.id, r1_0.rating from Review r1_0 join Purchase p1_0 on p1_0.id=r1_0.purchase_id left join Route r2_0 on r2_0.id=p1_0.route_id left join (User u1_0 left join DriverUser u1_1 on u1_0.id=u1_1.id left join TourGuideUser u1_2 on u1_0.id=u1_2.id) on u1_0.id=p1_0.user_id where r1_0.purchase_id=? Hibernate: select r1_0.id, r1_0.comment, r1_0.purchase_id, p1_0.id, p1_0.code, p1_0.date, r2_0.id, r2_0.maxNumberUsers, r2_0.name, r2_0.price, r2_0.totalKm, p1_0.totalPrice, u1_0.id, case when u1_1.id is not null then 1 when u1_2.id is not null then 2 when u1_0.id is not null then 0 end, u1_0.active, u1_0.birthdate, u1_0.email, u1_0.name, u1_0.password, u1_0.phoneNumber, u1_0.username, u1_1.expedient, u1_2.education, u1_1.id, u1_2.id, r1_0.rating from Review r1_0 join Purchase p1_0 on p1_0.id=r1_0.purchase_id left join Route r2_0 on r2_0.id=p1_0.route_id left join (User u1_0 left join DriverUser u1_1 on u1_0.id=u1_1.id left join TourGuideUser u1_2 on u1_0.id=u1_2.id) on u1_0.id=p1_0.user_id where r1_0.purchase_id=? testcase.name: getRoutesWithStopTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.description, s1_0.name from Stop s1_0 where s1_0.name like ? escape '' Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.description, s1_0.name from Stop s1_0 where s1_0.name like ? escape '' Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.description, s1_0.name from Stop s1_0 where s1_0.name like ? escape '' Hibernate: select distinct r1_0.id, r1_0.maxNumberUsers, r1_0.name, r1_0.price, r1_0.totalKm from Route r1_0 join Route_Stop s1_0 on r1_0.id=s1_0.Route_id where s1_0.stops_id=? Hibernate: select distinct r1_0.id, r1_0.maxNumberUsers, r1_0.name, r1_0.price, r1_0.totalKm from Route r1_0 join Route_Stop s1_0 on r1_0.id=s1_0.Route_id where s1_0.stops_id=? Hibernate: select distinct r1_0.id, r1_0.maxNumberUsers, r1_0.name, r1_0.price, r1_0.totalKm from Route r1_0 join Route_Stop s1_0 on r1_0.id=s1_0.Route_id where s1_0.stops_id=?

testcase.name: getMaxStopOfRoutesTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select max((select count(1) from Route_Stop s1_0 where r1_0.id=s1_0.Route_id)) from Route r1_0

testcase.name: getTopNSuppliersInPurchasesTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s2_0.id, s2_0.authorizationNumber, s2_0.businessName from ItemService is1_0 join Service s1_0 on s1_0.id=is1_0.service_id join Supplier s2_0 on s2_0.id=s1_0.supplier_id group by s2_0.id order by count(distinct is1_0.purchase_id) desc limit ? Hibernate: select s2_0.id, s2_0.authorizationNumber, s2_0.businessName from ItemService is1_0 join Service s1_0 on s1_0.id=is1_0.service_id join Supplier s2_0 on s2_0.id=s1_0.supplier_id group by s2_0.id order by count(distinct is1_0.purchase_id) desc limit ?

testcase.name: getUserSpendingMoreThanTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select distinct u1_0.id, case when u1_1.id is not null then 1 when u1_2.id is not null then 2 when u1_0.id is not null then 0 end, u1_0.active, u1_0.birthdate, u1_0.email, u1_0.name, u1_0.password, u1_0.phoneNumber, u1_0.username, u1_1.expedient, u1_1.id, u1_2.education, u1_2.id from Purchase p1_0 join (User u1_0 left join DriverUser u1_1 on u1_0.id=u1_1.id left join TourGuideUser u1_2 on u1_0.id=u1_2.id) on u1_0.id=p1_0.user_id where p1_0.totalPrice>=? Hibernate: select distinct u1_0.id, case when u1_1.id is not null then 1 when u1_2.id is not null then 2 when u1_0.id is not null then 0 end, u1_0.active, u1_0.birthdate, u1_0.email, u1_0.name, u1_0.password, u1_0.phoneNumber, u1_0.username, u1_1.expedient, u1_1.id, u1_2.education, u1_2.id from Purchase p1_0 join (User u1_0 left join DriverUser u1_1 on u1_0.id=u1_1.id left join TourGuideUser u1_2 on u1_0.id=u1_2.id) on u1_0.id=p1_0.user_id where p1_0.totalPrice>=? Hibernate: select distinct u1_0.id, case when u1_1.id is not null then 1 when u1_2.id is not null then 2 when u1_0.id is not null then 0 end, u1_0.active, u1_0.birthdate, u1_0.email, u1_0.name, u1_0.password, u1_0.phoneNumber, u1_0.username, u1_1.expedient, u1_1.id, u1_2.education, u1_2.id from Purchase p1_0 join (User u1_0 left join DriverUser u1_1 on u1_0.id=u1_1.id left join TourGuideUser u1_2 on u1_0.id=u1_2.id) on u1_0.id=p1_0.user_id where p1_0.totalPrice>=?

testcase.name: getMostDemandedServiceTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.description, s1_0.name, s1_0.price, s1_0.supplier_id from ItemService is1_0 join Service s1_0 on s1_0.id=is1_0.service_id group by s1_0.id order by count(distinct is1_0.purchase_id) desc limit ? Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.authorizationNumber, s1_0.businessName from Supplier s1_0 where s1_0.id=?

testcase.name: getTourGuidesWithRating1Test
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select distinct tgl1_1.id, tgl1_2.active, tgl1_2.birthdate, tgl1_2.email, tgl1_2.name, tgl1_2.password, tgl1_2.phoneNumber, tgl1_2.id, tgl1_2.username, tgl1_1.education from Purchase p1_0 join Review r1_0 on p1_0.id=r1_0.purchase_id join Route r2_0 on r2_0.id=p1_0.route_id join route_tour_guide tgl1_0 on r2_0.id=tgl1_0.route_id join (TourGuideUser tgl1_1 join User tgl1_2 on tgl1_1.id=tgl1_2.id) on tgl1_1.id=tgl1_0.tour_guide_id where r1_0.rating=1

testcase.name: getTop3RoutesWithMaxRatingTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select r2_0.id, r2_0.maxNumberUsers, r2_0.name, r2_0.price, r2_0.totalKm from Purchase p1_0 join Review r1_0 on p1_0.id=r1_0.purchase_id join Route r2_0 on r2_0.id=p1_0.route_id group by r2_0.id order by avg(r1_0.rating) desc limit ?

testcase.name: getCountOfPurchasesBetweenDatesTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select count(p1_0.id) from Purchase p1_0 where p1_0.date between ? and ? Hibernate: select count(p1_0.id) from Purchase p1_0 where p1_0.date between ? and ? Hibernate: select count(p1_0.id) from Purchase p1_0 where p1_0.date between ? and ?
